metadata.description: On AMC Theatres, buy 2 IMAX tickets for the highest-rated movie currently showing at AMC Empire 25 in New York, select an upcoming Friday evening showtime, and choose two adjacent center seats in rows E–H

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account

instruction: On AMC Theatres, buy 2 IMAX tickets for the highest-rated movie currently showing at AMC Empire 25 in New York, select an upcoming Friday evening showtime, and choose two adjacent center seats in rows E–H
